message:
🐛 Fix saved mission CTAs: prominent button, correct toast, mount AgentSetupDialog (#3066)

- console.kubestellar.io: replace quiet text link with a full-width
  "Install KubeStellar Console" primary button (same style as Run Mission)
- Toast: show "Use the button below to get started." in demo mode instead
  of misleading "Click Run below"
- Mount AgentSetupDialog in Layout so the open-agent-setup event actually
  opens it (it was defined but never rendered in the component tree)

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

         onClose={() => setShowInClusterAgentDialog(false)}

         <div className="fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 duration-300">
